title: campanula × smithii
intro: Campanula × smithii, also known as Smith's bellflower, is a hybrid plant species of the Campanula genus. It is valued for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to promote digestive health and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to fully understand its effects on human health.
